preamble.summary: Enoch sees the western gates of heaven through which the stars pass and set. A single verse summarizing the western cosmic boundary.
preamble.remarkable: This brief chapter completes the tour of the four cardinal directions (east in 33, north in 34, west here, south in 36).
preamble.connections: Psalm 19:6 (the sun's circuit from one end of heaven to the other); Ecclesiastes 1:5-6 (the wind circuits).

verses.text_reference: And from thence I went to the west to the ends of the earth, and saw there three portals of the heaven open such as I had seen in the east, the same number of portals, and the same number of outlets.
verses.rendering: From there I went westward to the ends of the earth and saw three gates of heaven open — the same as I had seen in the east, the same number of gates and the same number of outlets.
translator_notes: The symmetry between east and west gates — identical in number — reinforces the orderliness of the cosmic architecture. God's design is balanced and complete.
